issues.title: Future Rust incompatibilities in dependencies
issues.detail: Cargo warnings indicate redis v0.24.0 and sqlx-postgres v0.7.4 contain code that will be rejected by a future Rust version. Not blocking current build but should be addressed in dependency updates.

issues.title: L1 submission failed
issues.detail: Expected l1_submitted='t' (L1 Vault reachable and transaction submitted), but l1_tx_hash is NULL. The lock cannot progress to confirmed without L1 settlement. This indicates either L1 RPC is unreachable or the submission transaction failed.

observations: Lock record exists in database (lock_id: 0x0e03cd3cca9b035827e946a51ed85e3d987825d602508e5c0b85fc2e11e1c0d4)
L1 anchoring transaction was NOT created: l1_tx_hash field is NULL or empty
L1Vault totalLocked() call succeeded: returned 120000000000000000 wei (1.2e17)
totalLocked value is non-zero, indicating vault state exists and is accessible
Script explicitly reports: 'L1 anchoring did not occur in this run; QS__L1_PRIVATE_KEY may be unset'

issues.title: L1 anchoring transaction not submitted
issues.detail: The lock record was created in the database but no corresponding L1 transaction hash was recorded. This indicates the L1 anchor mechanism either failed to execute or was never invoked. The diagnostic message suggests QS__L1_PRIVATE_KEY environment variable may be missing or unset, preventing the system from signing and submitting L1 transactions.

issues.title: Missing L1 transaction for consumer lock
issues.detail: Expected test sequence 'Consumer Lock' to result in a valid L1 transaction with receipt status 0x1 (success). Instead, no transaction was submitted at all. The lock exists only in the consumer database layer with no L1 settlement.
